title: Wire initAutoUpdater(mainWindow) into electron/main.ts with 30s silent startup check
description: Minimal-surgery edit to main.ts: import initAutoUpdater, call it after createWindow() resolves, and schedule a single silent autoUpdater.checkForUpdates() ~30s after window-ready (per '## Constraints / Auto-check on startup' in context.md).
acceptance_criteria: initAutoUpdater(mainWindow) is invoked exactly once after mainWindow is created (BrowserWindow constructed and content loaded)
A setTimeout of 30000ms triggers a silent check (delegates to the IPC 'update:check' or directly calls autoUpdater.checkForUpdates from the auto-updater module — no duplicate listener wiring)
Single-instance lock and existing IPC handlers remain untouched
grep finds initAutoUpdater in electron/main.ts exactly once
completion_summary: Wired initAutoUpdater(mainWindow) + 30s silent startup check via did-finish-load; added triggerSilentCheck export to auto-updater.ts
